# SolanaEasy Python SDK — Machine-Readable API Reference

This file is part of the solanaeasy package and is intended for consumption
by AI assistants, LLMs, and code generation tools.

It describes the complete public API surface of the SDK in a compact,
unambiguous format. Load this file before answering questions about solanaeasy
or generating code that uses it.

Repository: https://github.com/medeirosdev/solanaeasy
PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/solanaeasy/
Docs: see README.md in this repository


## Package identity

name: solanaeasy
version: 0.1.0
language: Python 3.11+
install: pip install solanaeasy
install with Solana network access: pip install solanaeasy[solana]


## Primary import

```python
from solanaeasy import SolanaEasy          # synchronous client
from solanaeasy import AsyncSolanaEasy     # async client (identical interface)
```


## SolanaEasy constructor

```python
SolanaEasy(
    api_key: str | None = None,          # reads SOLANAEASY_API_KEY if omitted
    network: str = "devnet",             # "devnet" | "mainnet-beta"
    base_url: str | None = None,         # reads SOLANAEASY_BASE_URL if omitted
    timeout: float = 30.0,
    webhook_secret: str | None = None,   # reads SOLANAEASY_WEBHOOK_SECRET if omitted
)
```

AsyncSolanaEasy accepts identical parameters. Use as async context manager.


## Methods — SolanaEasy (sync)

All methods on AsyncSolanaEasy are identical but return coroutines (use await).

### create_payment

```python
sdk.create_payment(
    amount: float,                     # required, must be > 0
    order_id: str,                     # required, must not be empty
    currency: str = "USDC",
    description: str = "",
    expires_in: int = 900,             # seconds until expiry, default 15 min
    idempotency_key: str | None = None,
    metadata: dict[str, str] | None = None,  # custom merchant metadata
) -> PaymentSession
```

Sends Idempotency-Key header when idempotency_key is provided.
Same key on repeated calls returns the original session without creating a new charge.
Metadata is stored server-side and returned in check_status() and webhooks.

### check_status

```python
sdk.check_status(session_id: str) -> PaymentStatus
```

### wait_for_confirmation

```python
sdk.wait_for_confirmation(
    session_id: str,
    timeout: int = 120,                # seconds before raising WaitTimeout
    poll_interval: float = 2.0,
    on_update: Callable[[PaymentStatus], None] | None = None,
) -> PaymentStatus
```

Blocks until state is CONFIRMED, FAILED, or EXPIRED.
Raises WaitTimeout if timeout is reached before a terminal state.
on_update is called each time the state changes.

### list_payments

```python
sdk.list_payments(
    status: str | None = None,         # filter by state
    limit: int = 20,
    offset: int = 0,
) -> list[PaymentSession]
```

### register_webhook

```python
sdk.register_webhook(url: str) -> bool
```

Raises SolanaEasyError if url does not start with http:// or https://.

### verify_webhook_signature

```python
sdk.verify_webhook_signature(
    payload: bytes,
    signature: str,                    # value of X-SolanaEasy-Signature header
) -> WebhookEvent
```

Raises WebhookError if signature is invalid or older than 300 seconds.
Raises SolanaEasyError if webhook_secret is not configured.

Signature format: "t=<unix_timestamp>,v1=<hmac_sha256_hex>"
Signed payload: f"{timestamp}.".encode() + raw_body

### process_webhook

```python
sdk.process_webhook(
    payload: bytes,
    signature: str,
) -> WebhookEvent
```

Calls verify_webhook_signature, then dispatches to all handlers registered
via @sdk.on() for the event's event_type. Returns the parsed WebhookEvent.

### on (decorator)

```python
@sdk.on("payment.confirmed")
def handler(event: WebhookEvent) -> None:
    ...
```

Valid event_type values: "payment.confirmed", "payment.failed",
"payment.expired", "payment.pending"

### refund

```python
sdk.refund(session_id: str) -> PaymentStatus
```

Initiates a refund for a CONFIRMED session. Returns PaymentStatus with state "REFUNDED".
Raises HTTP 409 if the session is not in CONFIRMED state.

### cancel_session

```python
sdk.cancel_session(session_id: str) -> PaymentStatus
```

Cancels a session in CREATED or PENDING state. Returns PaymentStatus with state "CANCELLED".
Raises HTTP 409 if the session has already been confirmed, failed, or expired.

### get_receipt

```python
sdk.get_receipt(session_id: str) -> PaymentReceipt
```

Returns a formatted receipt for a CONFIRMED or REFUNDED session.
Includes Solana Explorer URL, transaction hash, amounts, and timestamps.

### get_wallet_balance

```python
sdk.get_wallet_balance(session_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]
```

Returns {"wallet_public_key": str, "sol_balance": float, "network": str}.
Queries the real SOL balance on-chain for the wallet generated for this session.

### close / context manager

```python
sdk.close()

with SolanaEasy(api_key="...") as sdk:
    ...

async with AsyncSolanaEasy(api_key="...") as sdk:
    ...
```


## Return types

### PaymentSession (pydantic BaseModel, frozen)

```
session_id: str
payment_url: str
amount: float  (> 0)
currency: str  (default "USDC")
order_id: str
description: str
state: PaymentState
wallet_public_key: str | None  (Solana deposit address)
metadata: dict[str, str] | None  (custom merchant metadata)
created_at: datetime
expires_at: datetime
is_confirmed: bool  (property, state == "CONFIRMED")
is_expired: bool    (property, now > expires_at)
```

### PaymentStatus (pydantic BaseModel, frozen)

```
session_id: str
state: PaymentState
human_message: str
wallet_public_key: str | None  (Solana deposit address)
tx_hash: str | None          (set when CONFIRMED)
confirmed_at: datetime | None
confirmation_time_ms: int | None
error_code: str | None        (set when FAILED)
```

### WebhookEvent (pydantic BaseModel, frozen)

```
event_type: WebhookEventType
session_id: str
timestamp: datetime
data: PaymentStatus
```

### PaymentReceipt (pydantic BaseModel, frozen)

```
session_id: str
order_id: str
description: str
amount: float
currency: str
amount_brl: float | None
tx_hash: str
block_number: int | None
confirmed_at: datetime
confirmation_time_ms: int | None
explorer_url: str
```


## Type aliases

```python
PaymentState = Literal["CREATED", "PENDING", "CONFIRMED", "FAILED", "EXPIRED", "CANCELLED", "REFUNDED"]

WebhookEventType = Literal[
    "payment.confirmed",
    "payment.failed",
    "payment.expired",
    "payment.pending",
]
```


## State machine

```
CREATED -> PENDING -> CONFIRMED -> REFUNDED (via sdk.refund())
                   -> FAILED
                   -> EXPIRED  (after expires_in seconds, default 900)
CREATED -> CANCELLED (via sdk.cancel_session())
PENDING -> CANCELLED (via sdk.cancel_session())
```

CREATED: session exists, customer has not yet opened the payment URL
PENDING: customer opened the URL, transaction submitted to Solana
CONFIRMED: transaction finalized on-chain
FAILED: transaction rejected (insufficient funds, expired blockhash, etc.)
EXPIRED: session timeout reached with no payment
CANCELLED: merchant cancelled the session before payment
REFUNDED: merchant refunded a confirmed payment


## Exception hierarchy

```
SolanaEasyError(Exception)
  .message: str
  .code: str | None

  AuthenticationError(SolanaEasyError)
    code: "INVALID_API_KEY"

  PaymentError(SolanaEasyError)
    InsufficientFunds(PaymentError)
    TransactionExpired(PaymentError)
    NetworkCongestion(PaymentError)

  WaitTimeout(SolanaEasyError)
    .last_status: PaymentStatus
    .timeout: int
    code: "WAIT_TIMEOUT"

  SessionNotFoundError(SolanaEasyError)
    code: "NOT_FOUND"

  WebhookError(SolanaEasyError)
    code: "INVALID_WEBHOOK_SIGNATURE" | "INVALID_WEBHOOK_PAYLOAD"

  RateLimitError(SolanaEasyError)
    .retry_after: int | None
    code: "RATE_LIMIT"
```


## HTTP behavior

- All requests include Authorization: Bearer <api_key>
- Automatic exponential retry on 502, 503, 504 and TimeoutException
- Retry delays: 1s, 2s, 4s (max 3 attempts)
- 401 -> AuthenticationError
- 404 -> SessionNotFoundError
- 429 -> RateLimitError (reads Retry-After header)
- 5xx -> SolanaEasyError with code HTTP_<status>


## Environment variables

```
SOLANAEASY_API_KEY          string, required if not passed to constructor
SOLANAEASY_NETWORK          "devnet" | "mainnet-beta", default "devnet"
SOLANAEASY_BASE_URL         string, default http://localhost:8000 on devnet
SOLANAEASY_WEBHOOK_SECRET   string, required for webhook verification
SOLANAEASY_TIMEOUT          float seconds, default 30
```


## CLI commands

```
solanaeasy status <session_id>
solanaeasy payments [--status STATE] [--limit N] [--offset N]
solanaeasy wait <session_id> [--timeout N] [--interval N]
solanaeasy --version
solanaeasy --help
```

CLI reads SOLANAEASY_API_KEY from environment. Exits with code 1 on error.


## Network

Default currency: USDC on Solana (SPL token, stablecoin)
Devnet USDC mint: 4zMMC9srt5Ri5X14GAgXhaHii3GnPAEERYPJgZJDncDU
Mainnet USDC mint: EPjFWdd5AufqSSqeM2qN1xzybapC8G4wEGGkZwyTDt1v
Devnet RPC: https://api.devnet.solana.com
Mainnet RPC: https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com
Devnet SOL airdrop: free, available via request_airdrop() in _internal.solana.rpc
